title: Amethyst Theme
description: Red Amethyst GUI Pack | Made for Mythcraft 5
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9b29ffe9340f0ce03946f03961a68440023c3fae.png)

Amethyst theme is a 1.21.1 texture pack that transforms the Minecraft GUI into a modern interface with a smooth amethyst finnish.

This Texturepack is the main GUI pack for Mythcraft 5, and supports several of my own mods such as boundless

# Activly maintained and updated over on curseforge
